identity.name: InviteAI
identity.description: A fusion of Gamma.app's modern gradient aesthetic with the grandeur of Indian royal weddings. Deep jewel tones, metallic gold accents, and intricate mandala motifs meet glassmorphism and smooth motion.

pairing_rules: Use 'Cinzel Decorative' for English Hero headings ONLY.
Use 'Rozha One' for Hindi Hero headings.
Use 'Outfit' for all App UI (Sidebar, Chat, Buttons, Inputs).
Use 'Anek Devanagari' for the actual Invitation Card text (supports both scripts beautifully).

primary.description: Electric Indigo - Modern Tech feel, used for primary actions in dark mode

secondary.description: Jaipur Gold - Metallic, non-yellow gold. Used for borders, icons, and premium accents

rules: APP UI must be DARK MODE by default to make Gold pop.
INVITATION CARD PREVIEWS must be LIGHT MODE (Ivory/Paper) to look printable.
Text on Gold backgrounds must be Dark (#0f0f10).
Text on Dark backgrounds must be Off-White (#f8fafc), never pure white.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-600 to-purple-600 hover:from-indigo-500 hover:to-purple-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-indigo-500/20 transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.gold: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#bf953f] to-[#b38728] text-black font-bold shadow-lg shadow-yellow-500/20 hover:shadow-yellow-500/40

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-purple-500/50 focus:ring-purple-500/20 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 backdrop-blur-sm

motion.philosophy: Smooth, majestic, cinematic. No jerky movements.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors; use solid deep colors.
Ensure 2-3x more spacing than typical defaults.
Glassmorphism requires `backdrop-blur-xl` and a subtle 1px border.
